Marine eggs: photo index for the Shores of Singapore

Kingdom

Updated

galleries: gallery1: - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/mollusca/gastropoda/melogenidae/cochlidium/050806skdg0609m.jpg” caption: Spiral melongena snail Pugilina cochlidium - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/mollusca/gastropoda/muricidae/chunky/050110skdd9489m.jpg” caption: Drills Family Muricidae - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/eggs/eggs/050608cftg7378ma.jpg” caption: Egg string awaiting identification - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/eggs/eggs/050726chgg0399m.jpg” caption: Egg string awaiting identification - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/eggs/eggs/050611kusg7835m.jpg” caption: Egg string awaiting identification - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/mollusca/slugs/nudibranchia/eggs/050309smkg3146m.jpg” caption: Nudibranch egg mass Order Nudibranchia - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/mollusca/gastropoda/naticidae/sandcollar/030703skdd0250m.jpg” caption: Sand collar Family Naticidae - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/eggs/eggs/110418tmftd8998m.jpg” caption: Egg blobs possibly sea slugs - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/mollusca/gastropoda/volutidae/nobilis/030619bbd0247ma.jpg” caption: Noble volute Cymbiola nobilis - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/mollusca/cephalopoda/cepeggs/020715chgd3359m.jpg” caption: Cephalopod egg capsules Order Cephalopoda - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/mollusca/cephalopoda/cepeggs/031030sntd0022m.jpg” caption: Cephalopod egg capsules Order Cephalopoda - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/ascidiacea/bubble/120820sisd0781m.jpg” caption: Bubble ascidians awaiting identification - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/ascidiacea/jelly/100726chgd9196m.jpg” caption: Jelly sea squirt awaiting identification - url: “http://www.wildsingapore.com/wildfacts/ascidiacea/eudistoma/050311labg3270m.jpg” caption: Yellow clustered bead ascidians Eudistoma sp. —
